creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
% pkg provides ntdll.so
Name    : wine-proton-6.3.2_1
Desc    : Wine with a bit of extra spice
Repo    : FreeBSD
Filename: usr/local/wine-proton/lib/wine/ntdll.so

Name    : wine-devel-6.11,1
Desc    : Microsoft Windows compatibility environment
Repo    : FreeBSD
Filename: usr/local/lib/wine/amd64-unix/ntdll.so

Name    : i386-wine-devel-6.11_1,1
Desc    : 32-bit Microsoft Windows compatibility environment for 64-bit FreeBSD
Repo    : FreeBSD
Filename: usr/local/lib32/wine/i386-unix/ntdll.so
% 

Incidentally there was/is the same error _without_ wine-proton: 

wine: could not load ntdll.so: Cannot open "/usr/local/bin/../lib/wine/x86_64-unix/ntdll.so"
